title: OpenFloor
description: A super simple mod that completely removes bedrock and lets the world generate without that unbreakable layer. It makes the world feel way more open and gives you room to build or mine in places you normally can’t.
body: This mod gets rid of all bedrock in your world, basically unlocking the bottom of the map so you can dig straight through where bedrock used to be. It replaces every bedrock block with normal terrain so the world feels deeper, cleaner, and way more open. You can build down there, mine down there, or just mess around with the new empty space
